channel.title: Nielsen Norman Group Articles
channel.description: UX research articles from the Nielsen Norman Group (fixture).

item.title: Updated: Error Message heuristic with touch-target minimums
item.description: The error-message heuristic has been revised to incorporate touch-target minimum guidance derived from recent usability findings on mobile forms. Updates the principle around visibility-of-system-status for error states.

item.title: Opinion: 10 ways to improve your onboarding
item.description: Ten practical tactics to improve product onboarding, drawn from consulting engagements. Covers first-run flows, empty-state messaging, and progressive disclosure.
